MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-05-2008 IN 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/7/08 IS CONTINUED TO 8/25/08 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND NOTICE MAILED BY THE COURT. LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JAMES GREGORY DOXEY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO BREACH OF STIPULATION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT WAS IN BREACH OF THE SETTLEMENT, THERE WAS NOT ANY WRITTEN MODIFICATION OF IT, AND DEFENDANT HAD WAIVED ANY RIGHT TO SEEK RELIEF FROM THE CONSEQUENCES. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. RULING - THE PARTIES INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE PARTIES HAVE REACHED A SETLLEMENT AND THE DEFENDANT IS NOT CONTESTING THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JAMES GREGORY DOXEY'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment PURSUANT TO BREACH OF STIPULATION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT WAS IN BREACH OF THE SETTLEMENT, THERE WAS NOT ANY WRITTEN MODIFICATION OF IT, AND DEFENDANT HAD WAIVED ANY RIGHT TO SEEK RELIEF FROM THE CONSEQUENCES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
